pokemon:milcery.name: Milcery
pokemon:milcery.summary: They say that any patisserie visited by Milcery is guaranteed success and good fortune.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: They say that any patisserie visited by Milcery is guaranteed success and good fortune.
This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: They say that any patisserie visited by Milcery is guaranteed success and good fortune.

pokemon:alcremie.name: Alcremie
pokemon:alcremie.summary: When Alcremie is content, the cream it secretes from its hands becomes sweeter and richer.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When Alcremie is content, the cream it secretes from its hands becomes sweeter and richer.
When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it’s decorated with cream.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When Alcremie is content, the cream it secretes from its hands becomes sweeter and richer.
